{"content": "     1|# Format Specification — Knowledge Base V2
     2|
     3|> Ground truth for file format rules.
     4|> Consumed by: Hermes Format Validator + OpenClaw Compile Agent.
     5|> Changes here directly affect validation behavior.
     6|
     7|**Version:** 2.0
     8|**Last updated:** 2026-05-09
     9|
    10|---
    11|
    12|## 1. Scope
    13|
    14|This spec defines the **structural format** for:
    15|- `wiki/concepts/<concept-slug>.md` — knowledge atoms
    16|- `wiki/sources/src_<slug>.md` — per-source notes
    17|
    18|**What this spec covers:**
    19|- File naming conventions
    20|- Frontmatter schema (fields, types, order)
    21|- Required sections and their order
    22|- Markdown syntax rules
    23|- Wikilink format
    24|
    25|**What this spec does NOT cover:**
    26|- Content quality (factual accuracy, completeness, coherence) → see Output Validator
    27|- Vietnamese language quality (grammar, spelling) → see Output Validator
    28|- Content depth or length requirements → see Output Validator
    29|
    30|Files in other folders (`raw/`, `wiki/tag/`, `wiki/topic/`, `wiki/reviews/`) have different formats and are not covered here.
    31|
    32|---
    33|
    34|## 2. Concept file format
    35|
    36|### 2.1 Naming convention
    37|
    38|```
    39|wiki/concepts/<concept-slug>.md
    40|```
    41|
    42|**Rules:**
    43|- `<concept-slug>` must be lowercase with hyphens (e.g., `ai-security-tools`, `defi-exploits`)
    44|- No spaces, underscores, or special characters except hyphens
    45|- Vietnamese diacritics allowed in slug (e.g., `tối-ưu-hóa-context`)
    46|- Max length: 50 characters
    47|
    48|**Validation:**
    49|- ERROR: Slug contains invalid characters (spaces, underscores, special chars)
    50|- ERROR: Slug exceeds 50 characters
    51|- WARNING: Slug uses uppercase letters
    52|
    53|### 2.2 Required frontmatter
    54|
    55|```yaml
    56|---
    57|type: concept
    58|status: draft | reviewed | needs-revision
    59|main_tag: <one-from-pool-a>
    60|sub_tags: [<one-to-three-from-pool-b>]
    61|topic: <lowercase-hyphen-slug>
    62|sources:
    63|  - [[wiki/sources/src_<slug>]]
    64|last_updated: YYYY-MM-DD
    65|---
    66|```
    67|
    68|**Field definitions:**
    69|
    70|| Field | Type | Required | Validation |
    71||---|---|---|---|
    72|| `type` | string | Yes | Must be exactly `concept` |
    73|| `status` | enum | Yes | One of: `draft`, `reviewed`, `needs-revision` |
    74|| `main_tag` | string | Yes | Must exist in `TAGS.md` Pool A |
    75|| `sub_tags` | array | Yes | 1–3 tags from `TAGS.md` Pool B |
    76|| `topic` | string | Yes | Lowercase-hyphen slug, max 60 chars |
    77|| `sources` | array | Yes | Wikilinks to `wiki/sources/src_*.md` files |
    78|| `last_updated` | date | Yes | ISO format `YYYY-MM-DD` |
    79|
    80|**Field order (required):**
    81|1. `type`
    82|2. `status`
    83|3. `main_tag`
    84|4. `sub_tags`
    85|5. `topic`
    86|6. `sources`
    87|7. `last_updated`
    88|
    89|**Validation:**
    90|- ERROR: Missing required field
    91|- ERROR: Field has wrong type (e.g., `sub_tags` is string not array)
    92|- ERROR: `status` not one of allowed values
    93|- ERROR: `main_tag` not in TAGS.md Pool A
    94|- ERROR: `sub_tags` contains tag not in TAGS.md Pool B
    95|- ERROR: `sub_tags` has <1 or >3 items
    96|- ERROR: `last_updated` not valid ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD)
    97|- ERROR: Invalid YAML syntax
    98|- WARNING: Field order does not match spec
    99|- WARNING: `sources` array is empty
   100|
   101|### 2.3 Required sections (in order)
   102|
   103|```markdown
   104|# <Concept Title>
   105|
   106|## Definition
   107|
   108|## Key ideas
   109|
   110|## Related concepts
   111|
   112|## Sources
   113|```
   114|
   115|**Section rules:**
   116|- All sections required
   117|- Section order must match above
   118|- Use H2 (`##`) for all section headers
   119|- `## Sources` section auto-generated by Compile Agent — manual edits will be overwritten
   120|
   121|**Validation:**
   122|- ERROR: Missing required section
   123|- ERROR: Section uses wrong heading level (not H2)
   124|- ERROR: Duplicate section header
   125|- WARNING: Section order does not match spec
   126|- INFO: Could add optional `## Notes` section for Julius's annotations
   127|
   128|### 2.4 Internal links
   129|
   130|**Rules:**
   131|- Use wikilink syntax: `[[target]]` or `[[target|display text]]`
   132|- Concepts link to concepts: `[[other-concept]]`
   133|- Concepts link to sources: `[[wiki/sources/src_slug]]`
   134|- No external URLs in concept body — put in source files instead
   135|
   136|**Validation:**
   137|- ERROR: Link uses markdown syntax `[text](url)` for internal wiki link
   138|- ERROR: Wikilink has spaces around brackets: `[[ target ]]`
   139|- WARNING: Wikilink points to non-existent file
   140|- INFO: Could use wikilink instead of full path for internal links
   141|
   142|---
   143|
   144|## 3. Source file format
   145|
   146|### 3.1 Naming convention
   147|
   148|```
   149|wiki/sources/src_<slug>.md
   150|```
   151|
   152|**Rules:**
   153|- Prefix `src_` required
   154|- `<slug>` matches the original raw file slug (e.g., `src_anthropic-claude-code`)
   155|- Same slug rules as concepts (lowercase-hyphen, max 50 chars)
   156|
   157|**Validation:**
   158|- ERROR: Missing `src_` prefix
   159|- ERROR: Slug contains invalid characters
   160|- ERROR: Slug exceeds 50 characters
   161|- WARNING: Slug uses uppercase letters
   162|
   163|### 3.2 Required frontmatter
   164|
   165|```yaml
   166|---
   167|type: source
   168|original: raw/<type>/YYYY-MM-DD_<slug>.md
   169|main_tag: <one-from-pool-a>
   170|sub_tags: [<one-to-three-from-pool-b>]
   171|topic: <lowercase-hyphen-slug>
   172|date_compiled: YYYY-MM-DD
   173|url: <optional-original-url>
   174|author: <optional-author-name>
   175|---
   176|```
   177|
   178|**Field definitions:**
   179|
   180|| Field | Type | Required | Validation |
   181||---|---|---|---|
   182|| `type` | string | Yes | Must be exactly `source` |
   183|| `original` | path | Yes | Must point to existing file in `raw/` |
   184|| `main_tag` | string | Yes | Must exist in `TAGS.md` Pool A |
   185|| `sub_tags` | array | Yes | 1–3 tags from `TAGS.md` Pool B |
   186|| `topic` | string | Yes | Lowercase-hyphen slug |
   187|| `date_compiled` | date | Yes | ISO format `YYYY-MM-DD` |
   188|| `url` | string | No | Original URL if available |
   189|| `author` | string | No | Original author if known |
   190|
   191|**Field order (required):**
   192|1. `type`
   193|2. `original`
   194|3. `main_tag`
   195|4. `sub_tags`
   196|5. `topic`
   197|6. `date_compiled`
   198|7. `url` (if present)
   199|8. `author` (if present)
   200|
